title: Fictiv and MISUMI report on the state of manufacturing, supply chain digitalization
description:
MISUMI Americas finds that AI, digital platforms, and regional resilience are priorities for industrial modernization.

The post Fictiv and MISUMI report on the state of manufacturing, supply chain digitalization appeared first on The Robot Report.
